name: Cranberry or Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh Blueberries OR 1 cup Canned Blueberries, drained
1 tablespoon Grated Orange or Lemon Rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder together in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Add butter and milk to the beaten eggs. Mix well.
4. Gradually combine the liquid ingredients with the dry ingredients using a few gentle stirs until just combined.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries or cranberries until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
6. Grease a muffin pan well.
7. Fill each muffin cavity about 2/3 full with the batter.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
